sections.description: Full-stack SEO management plugin. Handles title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, cache purge, and self-updates. RankMath not required.
sections.changelog:
2.0.7

Fix llms.txt critical error: add ob_end_clean() before header() calls in serve functions to clear WP output buffer. Same fix applied to sitemap serve functions.

2.0.6

Fix llms.txt 301 trailing-slash loop: use wp hook + REQUEST_URI.

2.0.5

Fix WSOD on Cloudways/LiteSpeed.
